overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence from The Witcher 3 showing a character walking along a lakeside shore during a dramatic sunset with vivid orange and teal skies. The camera follows the character as they traverse from shallow water to sandy beach, passing a distinctive red house and wooden fisherman structures along the shoreline.

agents.ego_description: walking through shallow water along the lakeshore, moving toward the tree-lined bank

entered.detail: calm reflective water surface mirroring the orange sunset clouds
dramatic orange and red sunset clouds against teal sky
silhouetted castle or ruin structures on distant shoreline
dark silhouetted trees lining the left shore

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a wide view of a tranquil lake at sunset, with vivid orange clouds reflected in the shallow water. The camera moves steadily forward through the water toward a tree-lined shore, with distant castle ruins visible on the horizon.

events.description: transitions from walking in shallow water onto sandy beach shoreline

agents.ego_description: walking along the sandy beach, moving away from the water's edge toward higher ground

entered.detail: wet sand reflecting the sunset colors along the shoreline
large rock formation emerging on the right side of the beach

segments.scene_description: The camera moves from the water onto a sandy beach, with the lake now visible to the left. Rocky outcrops appear on the right as the path continues along the shoreline, and the tree line recedes into the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: beach path approaching red wooden house

events.description: red wooden house comes into view on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking along the beach path toward a red house, passing rocky outcrops

wooden boat with yellow sail docked near the shore
scattered rocks and boulders along the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: A distinctive red wooden house appears on the right as the camera walks along the beach. A yellow-sailed boat becomes visible on the water to the left, and the path winds between rocky outcrops and the shoreline.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden dock area with fisherman house

events.description: approaching wooden fisherman house with character visible near entrance

agents.ego_description: walking along the path past the red house toward a wooden fisherman house where a character stands

notable_agents.action: Geralt with white hair standing near the wooden house entrance, facing the water

entered.detail: rustic wooden house with thatched roof and warm interior lighting
wooden pier structure extending into the lake

segments.scene_description: The camera passes the red house and approaches a rustic wooden fisherman house where Geralt stands near the entrance. The yellow sail boat is now behind on the left, and the path leads to the house with dense vegetation surrounding the area.

events.description: camera turns around to face the lake and sunset, away from the house

agents.ego_description: turning to face the sunset over the lake, taking in the panoramic view of the water and distant mountains

entered.detail: mountain range silhouetted against the orange sunset sky

segments.scene_description: The camera turns away from the wooden house to reveal a breathtaking view of the lake at sunset. The orange sky reflects vividly on the water surface, with distant mountains and castle ruins silhouetted against the colorful horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a tranquil lake surface into a rugged shoreline under a vivid sunset. It begins with a wide view of shallow water reflecting orange clouds, moving steadily forward toward a tree-lined shore with distant castle ruins on the horizon. As the camera advances, the perspective shifts from the water onto a sandy beach, leaving the lake to the left. The scene then expands as rocky outcrops emerge on the right, while the distant tree line recedes as the path continues along the coast.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a lakeside shore that transitions from a path of coastal dwellings to a wide, panoramic vista of a sunset horizon. It begins by winding between rocky outcrops and the shoreline, passing a distinctive red wooden house on the right while a yellow-sailed boat glides across the water to the left. As the camera moves forward, the scene shifts toward a rustic wooden fisherman house surrounded by dense vegetation where Geralt stands near the entrance. The camera then turns away from the structure, expanding the view to reveal the vast lake reflecting a vivid orange sky. Finally, the perspective opens fully to show distant mountains and castle ruins silhouetted against the colorful horizon.
